title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates how to build AI agents using the Strands Agents SDK, showing four progressively complex examples: a single-tool agent, a multi-tool agent, an agent with execution hooks, and a multi-agent orchestrator. The video emphasizes that agents operate as loops where models reason, select tools, execute them, and repeat.
